lines: Butters led the way on 80pts but Portugal just fucking collapsed 0–1 to Spain, boots off, socks off, entire tournament over — that's your flagship ship sunk, you smug Portuguese-backing prick, still got Morocco and Norway but the crown jewel is in the bin.

Jim, sitting 5th on 59pts, watched Spain knife Butters in the throat and is absolutely thriving — Qatar went home embarrassed but Spain are still marching and Morocco are alive too, you jammy two-faced bastard.

Ellis is still in it with Argentina who ground out a gritty 3–2 against Egypt — good for her, the lucky fuck, because South Korea, Paraguay and New Zealand are already rotting in the graveyard so Argentina are the only thing keeping her from total irrelevance.

Special mention to Dene, sitting 10th and last on 43pts — France are your ONE active team, every other cunt on your ticket has been eliminated, you are essentially paying a subscription fee to watch Mbappé while the rest of your sweepstake rots like a bin bag in August, it is genuinely pathetic.

Today's big one: Switzerland vs Colombia — Carter (4th, 67pts) and The Foreman (9th, 44pts) both need Colombia to survive, and if the Swiss bottle it, those two get a rare boost, so watch that one closely because it's the only meaningful thing either of them has left.
